title: Create Link and Campaigns routes are unreachable from any navigation UI
Mobile fixed top bar overlaps page content — flex-row spacer div contributes zero vertical offset
--primary #00802B used as text color fails WCAG AA contrast on all dark surfaces
Zero loading.tsx or error.tsx anywhere under /dashboard — blank first paints, dead range pickers, and errors that nuke the whole shell
Wide tables on mobile hide most columns — including every row action — behind undiscoverable horizontal scroll
Clicks Over Time chart renders completely flat/empty despite 200 recorded clicks in the window
BarChart panels render axis + category labels with literally zero visible bars — reads as broken, not empty
'URL' type badge is nearly invisible against the dark table background
Create, link-detail, and campaigns pages each stack a redundant inner header + max-w-7xl container inside the shared layout chrome
Swallowed query errors render identically to genuine empty states across Overview, Links, and Campaigns
Link-detail and campaigns pages hand-roll card containers and headers instead of the shared Card/CardTitle primitives, drifting from the design system
Chart colors are a patchwork of hardcoded hex and off-brand greens with no shared token system across five chart components
Brand display font (DM Serif font-heading) appears only on subordinate card titles — never on the wordmark or any page h1
No prior-period trend delta on any KPI anywhere in the dashboard
No CSV/export affordance anywhere in an analytics-first product
No search, filter, sort, or bulk actions on the Links table, the campaigns list, or the links-in-campaign table
Core-task CTAs missing: no Create Link entry on Overview, and empty states describe actions without offering them
CreateLinkForm allows duplicate submits — no loading guard on Enter, and the form re-enables during the 1.5s post-success redirect window
No inline field-level validation on the create form — errors only surface as toasts
Guaranteed loading-skeleton flicker on the dashboard create route despite server-side auth already being resolved
Deactivating a live link is a single click on a 24px icon with no confirmation or undo
No copy/share affordance for the short link on its own detail page
Analytics page has no per-link breakdown — all clicks are one undifferentiated blob
No geography breakdown on Analytics despite country data already existing on clicks
Devices donut has no legend — color is the only channel, and mobile has no hover
Type ('Deep Link') and Status ('Active') badges are visually identical green pills, hurting row scannability
Campaign list rows don't reflow on mobile — stats squeeze beside the wrapped description
Empty 'Links in Campaign' section disappears entirely instead of showing an empty state
Click counts everywhere are bare cumulative numbers with no per-link trend signal
